flavorText: Arcane Tricksters mix subtle magic with stealth and misdirection.

features.description: You are a one-third caster using Intelligence, drawing primarily from the wizard Illusion and Enchantment schools.
Your Mage Hand is invisible and can pick pockets, stow objects, unlock locks, and disarm traps at range.
If you are hidden from a target when casting a spell on it, the target has disadvantage on any saving throw it makes against the spell.
As a bonus action, use your Mage Hand to distract a creature and gain advantage on attack rolls against it.
When you succeed on a save against a spell targeting you, you can use your reaction to negate it and steal knowledge of the spell temporarily.

arcane-trickster-spellcasting.summary: Gain Intelligence-based one-third caster progression with stealth-oriented spell utility.
arcane-trickster-spellcasting.description: Arcane Trickster spellcasting should feel like rogue setup magic: control, distraction, infiltration, and precision support rather than front-line blasting.

arcane-trickster-mage-hand-legerdemain.summary: Your invisible Mage Hand becomes a true remote burglary and setup tool.
arcane-trickster-mage-hand-legerdemain.description: Mage Hand Legerdemain defines the subclass loop outside and inside combat: manipulate objects, handle traps, and create openings from safer positions.

arcane-trickster-magical-ambush.summary: Hidden casting becomes more dangerous because your target has a harder time resisting the trick.
arcane-trickster-magical-ambush.description: Magical Ambush rewards the subclass for combining stealth and spellcasting correctly instead of casting openly like a normal mage.

arcane-trickster-versatile-trickster.summary: Use your spectral hand to create a distraction and open a cleaner attack line.
arcane-trickster-versatile-trickster.description: Versatile Trickster lets your Mage Hand create the distraction itself, turning a familiar utility spell into a combat setup piece that helps land the rogue’s precision damage.
arcane-trickster-versatile-trickster.trigger: Bonus action with active Mage Hand

arcane-trickster-spell-thief.summary: Turn a successful defense against enemy magic into a moment of theft and denial.
arcane-trickster-spell-thief.description: Spell Thief is a standout late-game trick because it feels uniquely rogue: you do not merely resist the spell, you steal the edge for yourself.
arcane-trickster-spell-thief.trigger: Reaction when you succeed on a save vs a spell that targets only you
